user.title: Connect to SensorLinx
user.description: Enter your HBX SensorLinx account credentials.

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate SensorLinx
reauth_confirm.description: The credentials for {email} are no longer valid. Please re-enter them to restore the connection.

error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to SensorLinx. Check your network and try again.

abort.already_configured: This SensorLinx account is already configured.

data_description.scan_interval: How often to poll the SensorLinx API for device updates (30–3600 seconds).
data_description.timeout: Maximum seconds to wait for an API response before treating it as a failure (10–120 seconds).

set_hvac_mode_priority.name: Set HVAC Mode Priority
set_hvac_mode_priority.description: Set the HVAC mode priority (heat, cool, or auto) for a SensorLinx device. The device will prioritise the selected mode when deciding whether to heat or cool.

mode.name: Mode
mode.description: The HVAC mode priority to apply: heat, cool, or auto.

set_permanent_demand.name: Set Permanent Demand
set_permanent_demand.description: Enable or disable permanent heating and/or cooling demand for a SensorLinx device. When permanent demand is on, the device always maintains the buffer tank target temperature regardless of external zone demand signals.

permanent_hd.name: Permanent Heating Demand
permanent_hd.description: If true, enables permanent heating demand so the device always maintains the hot tank target temperature.

permanent_cd.name: Permanent Cooling Demand
permanent_cd.description: If true, enables permanent cooling demand so the device always maintains the cold tank target temperature.

set_hot_tank_config.name: Set Hot Tank Configuration
set_hot_tank_config.description: Configure hot tank parameters for a SensorLinx device. At least one parameter must be provided. Temperature values are in degrees Fahrenheit.

warm_weather_shutdown.name: Warm Weather Shutdown
warm_weather_shutdown.description: Outdoor temperature (°F) above which heating shuts down, or 'off' to disable (34–180°F).

outdoor_reset.name: Outdoor Reset Temperature
outdoor_reset.description: Design outdoor temperature (°F) for the hot tank outdoor reset curve, or 'off' to disable (-40–127°F).

differential.name: Heat Differential
differential.description: Hot tank differential in °F — how far above/below target before demand triggers (2–100°F).

min_temp.name: Min Tank Temperature
min_temp.description: Minimum (or target) hot tank temperature in °F (2–180°F).

max_temp.name: Max Tank Temperature
max_temp.description: Maximum hot tank temperature in °F, used with outdoor reset (2–180°F).

set_cold_tank_config.name: Set Cold Tank Configuration
set_cold_tank_config.description: Configure cold tank parameters for a SensorLinx device. At least one parameter must be provided. Temperature values are in degrees Fahrenheit.

cold_weather_shutdown.name: Cold Weather Shutdown
cold_weather_shutdown.description: Outdoor temperature (°F) below which cooling shuts down, or 'off' to disable (33–119°F).

outdoor_reset.name: Outdoor Reset Temperature
outdoor_reset.description: Design outdoor temperature (°F) for the cold tank outdoor reset curve, or 'off' to disable (0–119°F).

differential.name: Cold Differential
differential.description: Cold tank differential in °F — how far above/below target before demand triggers (2–100°F).

min_temp.name: Min Tank Temperature
min_temp.description: Minimum (or target) cold tank temperature in °F (2–180°F).

max_temp.name: Max Tank Temperature
max_temp.description: Maximum cold tank temperature in °F, used with outdoor reset (2–180°F).

set_dhw_config.name: Set DHW Configuration
set_dhw_config.description: Configure Domestic Hot Water (DHW) parameters for a SensorLinx device. At least one parameter must be provided.

enabled.name: DHW Enabled
enabled.description: Enable or disable the DHW demand channel.

differential.name: DHW Differential
differential.description: DHW differential in °F — how far below target before DHW demand triggers (2–100°F).

set_backup_config.name: Set Backup Configuration
set_backup_config.description: Configure backup heater parameters for a SensorLinx device. At least one parameter must be provided.

lag_time.name: Backup Lag Time
lag_time.description: Minutes between heat pump stages and backup activation, or 'off' to disable (1–240).

temp.name: Backup Temperature
temp.description: Outdoor temperature (°F) below which backup is allowed, or 'off' to disable (2–100°F).

differential.name: Backup Differential
differential.description: Tank differential (°F) at which backup activates immediately, or 'off' to disable (2–100°F).

only_outdoor_temp.name: Backup Only Outdoor Temp
only_outdoor_temp.description: Outdoor temperature (°F) below which only backup runs, or 'off' to disable (-40–127°F).

only_tank_temp.name: Backup Only Tank Temp
only_tank_temp.description: Tank temperature (°F) above which only backup heats, or 'off' to disable (33–200°F).

set_staging_config.name: Set Staging Configuration
set_staging_config.description: Configure heat pump staging parameters for a SensorLinx device. At least one parameter must be provided.

two_stage.name: Two-Stage Heat Pump
two_stage.description: Enable two-stage mode for dual-stage heat pumps.

rotate_cycles.name: Rotate Cycles
rotate_cycles.description: Number of on/off cycles before rotating heat pumps, or 'off' to disable (1–240).

rotate_time.name: Rotate Time
rotate_time.description: Hours of run time before rotating heat pumps, or 'off' to disable (1–240).

off_staging.name: Off Staging
off_staging.description: If enabled, all heat pumps stage off simultaneously.

set_system_config.name: Set System Configuration
set_system_config.description: Configure general system parameters for a SensorLinx device. At least one parameter must be provided.

weather_shutdown_lag_time.name: Weather Shutdown Lag Time
weather_shutdown_lag_time.description: Hours to wait before entering weather shutdown after the threshold is met (0–240).

heat_cool_switch_delay.name: Heat/Cool Switch Delay
heat_cool_switch_delay.description: Seconds to delay when switching between heat and cool modes (30–600).

wide_priority_differential.name: Wide Priority Differential
wide_priority_differential.description: When enabled, the tank target exceeds the setpoint by the differential before switching modes.
